steps.assistant_text: return 0 with UNFILLED jr-delay (move v0,zero; jr ra; nop). Plain -O2 fills the slot; -O2 -g3 disables reorg delay-fill. Whole head.c sub-unit flipped to -g3 (its only other compiled funcs are empty stubs, jr ra;nop, which are -g3-invariant); INCLUDE_ASM funcs unaffected.
